name: Chipotle Paste
recipeIngredient: 1 7 oz can chipotle chilies in adobo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine all the ingredients.
2. Process until blended but still slightly chunky, about 1 minute.
3. Transfer the paste to a tightly covered container and refrigerate for up to 3 weeks.
Building Block: By blending canned chipotle chilies in adobo with a few additional ingredients, you have a nearly effortless recipe for a versatile, spicy seasoning paste.
Uses:
- Brush the paste on beef and pork roasts, baby back ribs, chicken or shellfish.
- Mix with sour cream or mayonnaise to accompany grilled meat, poached chicken or baked potatoes.
- Add to a vinaigrette made from raw or steamed vegetables.
- Stir into chicken stock along with shredded cooked chicken, chickpeas and avocado cubes to make a zingy soup or into shrimp or lobster stock with assorted seafood.
- Mix into a simple tomato sauce to go with pasta, meatballs, sautéed shrimp or squid, or use as the base for a stew.
